beats: Rain stops, city appears washed clean.
The red mug remains on the table, as if waiting for the next person who needs truth.

voiceover.speaker: Narrator
voiceover.text: 雨停了。城市像刚被洗过，而红杯留在桌上，等下一个需要真相的人。

prompt.positive: Medium shot, kitchen table after rain, red mug prominently on table, soft post-rain light, clean city visible through window, hopeful atmosphere, cinematic, 35mm lens
